title: Hospital billing technology a factor driving surge in sepsis cases
description: Hospitals and insurers are harnessing the power of artificial intelligence and other tech tools to protect their businesses.
content: The number of hospitalizations Massachusetts has seen for septicemia has more than tripled since 2010, to more than 42,000 people in the year ending September 2025, preliminary state data show. Since at least 2019, it has been the third-leading cause... [11777 chars]

title: Kyvex strengthens partnership with Indian cricketer & IPL star Vaibhav Arora
description: Kyvex, founded by Indian entrepreneur Pearl Kapur alongside Chief Technology Officer Ravindra Varna, today announced a strategic partnership with Indian cricketer and IPL star Vaibhav Arora, representing the Kolkata Knight Riders. Arora joins Kyvex not only as an investor but also as the company's Sports Performance & AI Health Ambassador for India, symbolizing the growing synergy between sports, health, and artificial intelligence innovation.
content: New Delhi [India], March 20 (ANI): Kyvex, founded by Indian entrepreneur Pearl Kapur alongside Chief Technology Officer Ravindra Varna, on Friday announced a strategic partnership with Indian cricketer and IPL star Vaibhav Arora, representing the Kol... [2771 chars]

title: 78% of UK businesses use AI, few see financial gains

title: Data Centers Are Military Targets Now
description: With militaries increasingly relying on artificial intelligence, data centers have emerged as new targets for strikes.
content:
In retaliation for the ongoing U.S.–Israeli war, Iran responded with a novel form of counterattack. For the first time in military history, private sector data centers came under deliberate attack.

title: It's not too late to board the AI train
description: David Moon writes: Artificial intelligence is rapidly becoming essential, moving from a "toy" to "infrastructure."
content:

title: Jeff Bezos wants his orbital data centers.
description:
Blue Origin is seeking permission from the FCC to deploy nearly 52,000 solar-powered satellites into space that will handle artificial-intelligence computing, following similar applications from Elon Musk’s SpaceX and start-up Starcloud. The aim is to bolster terrestrial data centers, but experts are skeptical.
[Link: Blue Origin Formally Enters Race to Develop Data Centers in Space | https://www.wsj.com/tech/blue-origin-formally-enters-race-to-develop-data-centers-in-space-d7fefa00 | WSJ]

title: Tax Court Navigates AI Misuse Rules for Self-Represented Filers
description: The US Tax Court is starting to weigh its own guardrails around artificial intelligence misuse amid the additional thorny challenges of a high proportion of self-represented parties and the need to shield sensitive taxpayer information.

title: Like Computers, AI Will Create More Job Opportunities, Says 'AI Kid Of India' Raul John
description: At the ETNow.in Business Conclave & Awards 2026, AI Realm founder Raul John emphasised that artificial intelligence will not eliminate jobs, likening it to the advent of computers which created opportunities instead. , Technology & Science, Times Now
